articles.title: Early Heatwave Grips Adilabad; Temperatures Touch 39°C - Deccan Chronicle
articles.search_term: (heatwave OR "heat wave" OR "severe heatwave" OR "extreme heat" OR "heat spell" OR "scorching heat" OR "blistering heat" OR "sweltering heat" OR "hot winds" OR loo OR "hot loo winds" OR "intense heat" OR "unbearable heat" OR "deadly heat" OR heat OR "weather forecast" OR "weather update" OR "weather alert" OR "IMD forecast" OR "IMD prediction" OR "IMD alert" OR IMD OR "rising temperatures" OR "temperatures expected to rise" OR "relief from heat" OR "respite from heat" OR "heat respite" OR "respite from scorching heat") Telangana
articles.full_text:
The intense heat has forced people to remain indoors during afternoons, with reduced outdoor activity across the district.
Adilabad: Adilabad district is experiencing unusually high temperatures ahead of peak summer, with mercury levels ranging between 37°C and 39°C over the past few days.
The intense heat has forced people to remain indoors during afternoons, with reduced outdoor activity across the district.
The rising temperatures have also triggered drinking water issues, as streams and rivulets are drying up. In rural and tribal areas, women are facing hardships as they are forced to travel longer distances to fetch water.
Residents have begun using air coolers and air conditioners to cope with the heat. Social activities have also been affected, with people avoiding long travel for functions and limiting their time at gatherings.
Many prefer to step out only in the evenings to avoid the harsh daytime conditions.
( Source : Deccan Chronicle )
